name: bitwarden
description: Bitwarden and secrets-management workflows for homelab operations.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Bitwarden vault items and secrets-management flows.
interface.longDescription: Bitwarden provides secure agent workflows for finding vault items, handling unlocked CLI sessions, and supporting homelab credential lookup without hardcoding secrets.
defaultPrompt: Use Bitwarden to find the credential for this service.
Check whether the Bitwarden CLI session is unlocked.
Help prepare a secret lookup without exposing the value.
